name: CircuitFormer
description: 130,409 ngspice-simulated SPICE netlists on the open-source SkyWater SKY130 PDK, unified from three upstream sources into a single HuggingFace-loadable schema with deterministic topology-aware train/validation/test splits. Designed as a supervised (SPICE netlist → performance metrics) corpus for training of models for analog circuit design.

name: AnalogGym
description: AnalogGym encompasses 30 circuit topologies in five key categories: sensing front ends, voltage references, AMPs, low dropout regulators (LDOs), and phase-locked loops (PLLs). Among these, the LDOs and AMPs support the open-source Ngspice simulator and the SkyWater PDK, allowing for greater accessibility and reproducibility.

name: AMS-IO-Bench
description: A comprehensive benchmark dataset for automated IC IO ring generation using LLMs in Cadence Virtuoso.

name: AMSnet-KG
description: AMS circuit schematics and SPICE netlists annotated with a knowledge graph capturing functional and performance characteristics. Enables LLM-based AMS circuit auto-design via knowledge graph RAG: the framework retrieves matched circuit components, assembles topologies, and performs transistor sizing through Bayesian optimization with simulation feedback.

name: Masala-CHAI
description: 7,500 analog circuit schematics extracted from 10 textbooks, each paired with an AI-generated SPICE netlist. Designed to fine-tune LLMs for schematic-to-netlist generation; models fine-tuned on this dataset achieve a 46% improvement in Pass@1 scores on LLM-agentic frameworks.

name: AnalogSeeker
description: Textbook-derived analog circuit design QA corpus used to train AnalogSeeker, an open-source 32B foundation language model (Qwen2.5-based) for analog design assistance. The training data is constructed via a multi-agent knowledge distillation pipeline from domain textbooks; the model achieves 85.04% accuracy on the AMSBench-TQA benchmark.

name: GANA Circuit Data
description: OTA (Operational Transconductance Amplifier) circuit dataset in SPICE format for GNN-based automated netlist annotation. Provides adjacency matrices, node feature matrices, and binary label matrices for subcircuit identification, supporting the GANA framework published at DATE 2020.
